name: Poulet En Croute
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, boned, skinned, and pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a saucepan. Saute mushrooms until brown.
2. Add brandy and flambe with matches.
3. Spread 1 ounce of cheese on each chicken breast and cool.
4. Roll up the breasts, placing the seam side down. Pat each with butter. Set aside.
5. Melt 1/4 cup butter. Using two sheets of phyllo dough for each, place chicken on phyllo brushed with butter, about 2-3 inches from the end of the dough. Roll the dough up and fold in the sides. Brush with butter again.
6. Place the chicken on a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
7. For the sauce, melt butter, add flour, and stir until slightly browned. Remove from heat.
8. Slowly add brandy, then slowly add broth. Return to stove and heat until thickened. Add parsley and chives, seasoning to taste.
